name: Sauteed New Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes and slice them in half.
2. Heat butter and oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the sliced potatoes, salt, and pepper to the pan.
4. Cook for about 10 to 20 minutes until the potatoes are lightly browned and tender.
Serves: 4
